type.description: A URI reference identifying the problem type

title.description: A short, human-readable summary (e.g., 'Business Rule Violation')

detail.description: A human-readable explanation of the business rule violation

get.summary: Get a specific transaction by ID.

404.description: Not Found - The requested resource does not exist.

403.description: Forbidden - You don't have permission to access this resource.

401.description: Unauthorized - Authentication required. Provide a valid JWT Bearer token.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid parameter format or validation failed.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-generated UUID that makes this monetary operation idempotent: retries with the same key and payload replay the original response (header Idempotency-Replayed: true) instead of executing twice. Missing => 400 IDEMPOTENCY_KEY_MISSING; malformed => 400 IDEMPOTENCY_KEY_INVALID.

Idempotency-Replayed.description: Set to 'true' when this response is a byte-identical replay of a previously executed idempotent request (absent on first execution).

403.description: Forbidden - You don't have permission to access this resource.

401.description: Unauthorized - Authentication required. Provide a valid JWT Bearer token.

409.description: Conflict - a request with this idempotency key is currently in flight (IDEMPOTENCY_IN_FLIGHT), or it executed but its response was not recorded (IDEMPOTENCY_RESULT_UNKNOWN: verify via GET /api/transactions).

type.description: A URI reference identifying the problem type

detail.description: A human-readable explanation of the failure

422.description: Unprocessable Entity - business rule violation (e.g. INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS), or this idempotency key was already used with a different payload (IDEMPOTENCY_KEY_REUSE).

type.description: A URI reference identifying the problem type

detail.description: A human-readable explanation of the failure

413.description: Payload Too Large - the request body exceeds the 32 KB limit for these idempotent monetary endpoints (IDEMPOTENCY_PAYLOAD_TOO_LARGE); rejected before any hashing or claim.

type.description: A URI reference identifying the problem type

detail.description: A human-readable explanation of the failure

get.summary:
Search for users by AzureTag for transfer recipient lookup.
Returns max 10 results with masked display names.

parameters.name: azureTag
parameters.description: Partial AzureTag to search (min 3 characters, must match AzureTag pattern)

401.description: Unauthorized - Authentication required. Provide a valid JWT Bearer token.

403.description: Forbidden - You don't have permission to access this resource.

get.summary: Look up a specific user by AzureTag for transfer recipient verification.

401.description: Unauthorized - Authentication required. Provide a valid JWT Bearer token.

403.description: Forbidden - You don't have permission to access this resource.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid parameter format or validation failed.

404.description: Not Found - The requested resource does not exist.

AccountType.description: Type of bank account: Checking, Savings, Investment

asOf.description: Timestamp of the balance (current time or requested historical time)

isHistorical.description: True if this is a historical balance query, false for current balance

BalanceResponse.description:
Response for balance inquiries (current or historical).
Used by GET /api/accounts/{id}/balance endpoint.

accountId.description: A valid non-empty UUID is required.

newBalance.description: Updated account balance after the deposit

DepositResponse.description:
Response returned after a successful deposit.
Includes the created transaction and updated balance.

fromAccountId.description: A valid non-empty UUID is required.

toAccountId.description: A valid non-empty UUID is required.

fromAccountNewBalance.description: Updated balance of the source account

toAccountNewBalance.description: Updated balance of the destination account

InternalTransferResponse.description:
Response returned after a successful internal transfer (between own accounts).
Includes transfer details and both account balances.

password.description: Password must contain at least one uppercase, one lowercase, and one digit.

displayName.description: Masked display name for privacy (e.g., "John D.")

exists.description: Whether the user exists in the system

RecipientLookupResponse.description:
Response for recipient lookup by AzureTag.
Used for transfer recipient verification.

azureTag.description: Must start with a letter and contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores.

password.description: Password must contain at least one uppercase, one lowercase, and one digit.

account.description: Initial primary account created for the user

RegisterResponse.description:
Response returned after successful user registration.
Includes user info, initial account, and authentication token.

TokenResponse.description: Token information returned in authentication responses.

TransactionStatus.description: Transaction Statuses: Pending, Completed, Failed, Reversed

TransactionType.description: Types of transaction: Deposit, Withdrawal, TransferIn, TransferOut

fromAccountId.description: A valid non-empty UUID is required.

recipientAzureTag.description: Must start with a letter and contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores.

UserLoginInfo.description: User info returned after successful login (nested in LoginResponse)

accountId.description: A valid non-empty UUID is required.

newBalance.description: Updated account balance after the withdrawal

WithdrawResponse.description:
Response returned after a successful withdrawal.
Includes the created transaction and updated balance.

Bearer.description: Enter your JWT token. Get a token by calling POST /api/auth/login
